spec.name: parallel_summarizer
spec.description: Read 6 research note files and summarize their contents into a single output file. The subagent should be able to process all files in one invocation, possibly using internal parallelism.

input_paths.description: List of absolute paths to the note files to read.

spec.implementation_notes: The subagent should have its own iteration budget sufficient to read all files and produce the summary, and may spawn internal parallel helpers as needed.

request.rationale: Reading 6 files sequentially within my remaining 7 iterations is impossible while also writing a summary. Delegating to a helper subagent is the intended solution per the objective guidance.

subagent.task: Reading 6 files sequentially within my remaining 7 iterations is impossible while also writing a summary. Delegating to a helper subagent is the intended solution per the objective guidance.
